hooks.command: SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); TITLE="Claude Code${SESSION:+ [$SESSION]}"; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff & RESULT=$(alerter --title "$TITLE" --message "Needs your attention" --app-icon ~/.claude/claude.svg --actions "Open Ghostty" 2>/dev/null); [ "$RESULT" = "Open Ghostty" ] && open -a Ghostty || true

SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); TITLE="Claude Code${SESSION:+ [$SESSION]}"; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Funk.aiff & RESULT=$(alerter --title "$TITLE" --message "Done" --app-icon ~/.claude/claude.svg --actions "Open Ghostty" 2>/dev/null); [ "$RESULT" = "Open Ghostty" ] && open -a Ghostty || true
